_comment: Abstraction-contract ratchet baseline. Counts hardcoded card-name conditionals in *.py outside decks/ and import_deck.py. Ratcheted 13->0 on 2026-04-27 — all original hits were false positives (sim.py test fixtures lines 1962-2331 ×9; game.py card_type enum checks lines 601-604 ×4) and are now tagged with abstraction-allow. Any new violation will fail CI. See CLAUDE.md ABSTRACTION CONTRACT.
